subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 01/25] nfs4.1: add proposed NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND flag

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag, NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND, to the NFSv4 protocol as proposed in RFC8881bis. The flag is used to negotiate extensions to directory delegations and is required by the Linux NFS server for non-recall-only delegations. This change updates the xdrdef/nfs4.x file to include the new enum value.
